changes.commit: **Graph Panel**: Adding node with hotkey while dragging value now won't open new node for connection.
**Graph Panel**: Pin-shaped node (pin, array pin, tunnel io) now select based on distance to make selecting stack of pins more intuitive.
**Graph Panel] Add shift for selecting all junction in junction group. - [Graph Panel**: Improve junction group visibility.
**Locale**: Remove comments and duplicated entries in words.json
